name: Kavya Nair
summary: 6 years in retail operations and store management across premium lifestyle brands.

experience.title: Store Manager
bullets: Managed store P&L of ₹2.4Cr monthly revenue
Led team of 12 across sales, operations, and visual merchandising
Improved NPS from 67 to 84 over 18 months
Reduced shrinkage by 22% through inventory control processes

experience.title: Assistant Store Manager
bullets: Implemented new stock replenishment system reducing stockouts by 35%

achievements: Top Store Manager award 2023 across Forest Essentials India network
Launched 2 successful in-store events with 200+ attendees each
